title: Session panel component with item list and real-time updates
purpose: Displays session information and a list of diagrams, documents, and designs with update indicators and navigation capabilities. Integrates with session state management and supports real-time updates.
module_context: Exports a SessionPanel React component that accepts session data and item lists, with helper functions for formatting time and rendering item icons. Uses useSession hook for state management.

steps.content: Convert the timestamp to a Date object if it's a string.
Calculate the time difference between now and the provided timestamp.
Format the time difference as 'just now', minutes, hours, or days ago based on the difference.
If the difference is more than a week, format as a localized date string.
Return an empty string if no timestamp is provided.
Return a diagram icon SVG when the item type is diagram.
Return a design icon SVG when the item type is design.
Return a document icon SVG when the item type is document.
Combine diagrams, documents, and designs into a unified list of session items.
Sort the combined items by last modified timestamp in descending order.
Render an empty state message when no session is selected.
Render the session header with name, status, and activity information when not in compact mode.
Render an empty items list message when there are no items in the session.
Render a list of items with icons, names, types, and timestamps.
Display update indicators for items that have changes and are not selected.
Show a new tab button for each item that supports opening in a new tab.
Invoke the onItemClick callback with the clicked item.
Stop event propagation to prevent parent click handlers from firing.
Invoke the onItemOpenNewTab callback with the clicked item.
